overall.description: A first-person journey through a futuristic cyberpunk metro train in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves through the train interior past various passengers, transitions to an exterior view of neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards, then returns to the train interior showing more passengers.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train carriage with neon tube lighting

agents.ego_description: moving through the train car past seated and standing passengers

notable_agents.action: man in camouflage outfit sitting on bench looking at phone
woman with red hair sitting on bench

entered.detail: illuminated sign showing WESTBROOK destination and line information
yellow-brown bench seats along the train walls
yellow vertical pole for standing passengers to hold
large rectangular windows showing passing city lights
red illuminated vending machine with product displays

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a futuristic cyberpunk metro train interior. Passengers sit on yellow benches while others stand holding poles. A digital display shows the route to Westbrook. The lighting is artificial with neon accents, and the floor is polished metal.

scene_state.functional_zone: night city skyline viewed from elevated train tracks

events.description: camera transitions from train interior to exterior view showing neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: looking out at the passing cityscape from the moving train

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings covered in neon lights and illuminated windows
large floating advertisement displaying VOTE text with portrait
giant vertical advertisement for a beverage with IT'S BIG text
metal railway tracks visible in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The view shifts to the exterior of the train, revealing a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at night. Towering skyscrapers covered in neon signage and massive holographic billboards flash past as the train moves along elevated tracks. The atmosphere is dense with urban lighting and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train seating area with standing passengers

events.description: camera returns to train interior showing passengers from a seated perspective

agents.ego_description: observing fellow passengers while seated or standing in the train car

notable_agents.action: woman with ponytail sitting and drinking from a bottle
man in green shirt standing and holding an overhead rail

entered.detail: yellow-brown bench seats with passengers sitting
yellow vertical support pole in the aisle
illuminated route sign showing destination information

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the train interior, now positioned near a woman with a ponytail who is drinking from a bottle. Other passengers are visible sitting on benches and standing in the aisle. The digital display and yellow support poles are visible again as the train continues its journey through the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that glides through a futuristic metro interior before sweeping out into a neon-drenched cityscape and returning back inside. It begins by moving forward through the train car, passing passengers on yellow benches and polished metal floors under artificial neon lighting and a digital route display for Westbrook. As the camera shifts to the exterior, the view opens up to a sprawling metropolis at night, where towering skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards flash past along the elevated tracks. The scene then transitions back into the train interior, centering on a woman with a ponytail drinking from a bottle. Finally, the camera settles among the remaining passengers and yellow support poles as the journey through the city continues.
